scripts.build: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && npm run copy-files
scripts.build:release: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && RELEASE_BUILD=1 node esbuild.config.mjs production && mkdir -p dist && cp manifest.json styles.css dist/
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run fmt:check && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && npm run test
